guides.title: Zakat Eligibility: What It Means and How We Handle It
guides.description: The 8 asnaf (zakat recipient categories), scholarly considerations around programs vs. overhead, and how Good Measure Giving flags zakat-accepting charities without making the fiqh call for you.

guides.title: How to Evaluate a Muslim Charity
guides.description: A practical five-question framework: programs, financials, evidence of impact, governance, and the zakat dimension — plus the traps (like the overhead myth) that mislead well-intentioned donors.
